% ── EXPERIENCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Experience}

\entry{AI Engineer \& Software Engineer}{ADP}{Jul 2024 -- Present}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected LLM/RAG risk detection system processing 10K+ audit cases/month across 1M+ employee records --- aligning with audit and compliance stakeholders to flag time fraud, tax miscalculations, and duplicate payments --- reducing manual audit effort by 40\%.
  \item Engineered LangChain investigation agents to automate root-cause analysis across payroll anomalies; improved classification precision to 80\% and cut false positives by 25\%, eliminating unnecessary escalations.
  \item Integrated AWS Bedrock and OpenAI into production HR automation workflows, communicating model tradeoffs with product and support to improve operational efficiency 30\% and reduce resolution time 25\%.
  \item Built RAG pipelines ingesting IRS codes and state labor laws alongside structured payroll data; partnered with compliance to define rules, automated classification, and generated audit trails for every flagged case.
  \item Architected Node.js/Express microservices orchestrating LLM inference pipelines, handling 10,000+ daily API calls at \textless{}200 ms latency via connection pooling and caching strategies.
  \item Deployed on AWS (Lambda, Step Functions, DynamoDB, RDS, Glue) and Pivotal Cloud Foundry; cut infrastructure costs 40\% and eliminated 15+ hours of manual testing weekly while maintaining 99.9\%+ availability.
  \item Engineered React and Angular/TypeScript dashboards for real-time risk visualization and AI-insight drill-downs; incorporated auditor feedback, improving Time-to-Interactive by 1.2 seconds and page performance by 35\%.
  \item Engineered scalable Java Spring Boot microservices with Spring Cloud (Config, Gateway, Circuit Breaker) for high-availability payroll systems; built SOAP/RESTful APIs (JAX-WS, JAX-RS) for legacy system integration.
\end{itemize}

\entry{Data Analyst}{ADP}{Sep 2023 -- Jun 2024}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Architected Customer Feedback Intelligence System ingesting 80K--100K records daily from support tickets, app reviews, and chatbot logs; designed incremental pipeline for continuous enrichment without full reprocessing, eliminating overnight batch delays.
  \item Surfaced payment failures as the top driver of negative sentiment through cohort analysis; insight directly informed Q3 product prioritization and led to targeted engineering fixes that reduced payment-related complaints by 20\%.
  \item Engineered OpenAI-powered sentiment classification pipeline achieving 85\% accuracy on nuanced complaint categories --- replacing rule-based NLP models and cutting manual tagging effort by 50\%+, enabling automated processing of the full daily corpus.
  \item Delivered Tableau dashboards --- sentiment trends, volume by category, and issue drill-downs --- used daily by 40+ stakeholders across product and ops teams, aligning cross-functional priorities and enabling data-driven sprint decisions.
  \item Designed PostgreSQL schema for raw and enriched feedback; wrote SQL aggregations surfacing top complaint categories, sentiment distribution, and trend time-series; applied strategic indexing that reduced dashboard query load times for 40+ daily users.
  \item Built end-to-end Python orchestration layer for text preprocessing, OpenAI API calls, structured output parsing, and PostgreSQL ingestion; pipeline ran on a daily schedule with zero manual intervention across 100K+ records.
\end{itemize}
